mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ALGORITHM WHERE ENABLED = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ALARM WHERE STATUS = '미처리'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.tb_device WHERE TRIM(device_status) = 'NORMAL'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.tb_device WHERE TRIM(device_status) = 'ERROR'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.tb_device WHERE TRIM(device_status) = 'WARNING'
SELECT device_id AS deviceId, device_name AS deviceName, ip_address AS ipAddress, TRIM(device_status) AS deviceStatus FROM public.tb_device ORDER BY device_id
